title: selaginella lychnuchus
intro: Selaginella lychnuchus, also known as Spikemoss, is a type of epiphytic fern-like plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Selaginella lychnuchus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health conditions. Selaginella lychnuchus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and its extracts have also been used in modern pharmaceutical formulations to harness its medicinal properties.
